briefdescription.para: This function calculates the picture aspect ratio from horizontal and vertical resolution values.

parameterdescription.para: is the horizontal resolution in pixels.
is the vertical resolution in pixels.

simplesect.para: XV_VidC_PicAspectRatio structure containing the width and height aspect ratio values (16:10, 4:3, 5:4, 16:9, or 0:0 if no match).

inbodydescription.para: Macro to check if horizontal/vertical resolution matches specified aspect ratio

briefdescription.para: Initialize EDID control parameter structure with default values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to EDID control parameter structure to initialize.

inbodydescription.para: < Maximum Fixed Rate Link line rate
< Total number of video timing modes
< Number of Type VI timing descriptors
< Number of Type VII timing descriptors
< Number of Type VIII timing descriptors
< Number of Type IX timing descriptors
< Number of Type X timing descriptors

briefdescription.para: Convert EDID detailed timing descriptor to video timing parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to detailed timing descriptor structure.

detaileddescription.para: This driver supports Virtual Memory. The RTOS is responsible for calculating the correct device base address in Virtual Memory space.
This driver is not thread safe. Any needs for threads or thread mutual exclusion must be satisfied by the layer above this driver.

Asserts are used within all Xilinx drivers to enforce constraints on argument values. Asserts can be turned off on a system-wide basis by defining at compile time, the NDEBUG identifier. By default, asserts are turned on and it is recommended that users leave asserts on during development.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 mmo 24-01-2017 EDID Parser capability
